g.text: Where Overlaat sits in a self-hosted LLM stack
A fair waiting-queue + honest usage-accounting sidecar — the single network entry point in front of LiteLLM
Filled blue = the two services Overlaat adds · muted boxes = your existing self-hosted stack
② QUEUE + ACCOUNTING · ← Overlaat lives here
every caller grows its own backoff
✓ overlaat: burst pools in a FIFO queue →
drains in order, callers just wait
by design, instead of breaching unplanned.
actual usage-api dashboard — host GPU/RAM · active concurrency
by consumer · decode tok/s · output-size trend
decode tok/s at low load isolates
— a drop with no load means the
